# SNAP.Cards — Full Documentation

> AI-powered business networking platform for professionals and businesses.

## Platform Overview

SNAP.Cards enables professionals to digitize their business identity. Users create AI-powered business pages, scan physical business cards, build a contact network, and engage through a social feed. The platform is bilingual (English/Hebrew) with full RTL support.

## How It Works

### For Business Owners
1. Sign up at snap.cards
2. Use the Setup Wizard to describe your business (name, industry, target audience, services)
3. AI generates a complete business page with professional copy, SEO metadata, and structured sections
4. Customize with the visual editor — adjust colors, fonts, sections, images
5. Publish your page at `yourbusiness.snap.cards` or connect a custom domain
6. Optionally enable AI chatbot to answer visitor questions 24/7
7. Connect Google Calendar for appointment booking
8. Track visitors and leads with the analytics dashboard

### For Networking
1. Scan a physical business card (camera, upload, QR, or NFC)
2. AI extracts contact details automatically via OCR
3. Save to your contacts with tags and notes
4. Send connection requests to other SNAP.Cards users
5. Chat, share posts, and engage in the social feed

## Business Page Sections

Each AI-generated business page can include these sections:
- **Hero**: Main banner with business name, tagline, and call-to-action
- **About**: Business description and story
- **Services**: List of services or products offered
- **Gallery**: Photo showcase
- **Testimonials**: Customer reviews and quotes
- **Contact**: Contact form, phone, email, address, map
- **Social Links**: Links to social media profiles
- **FAQ**: Frequently asked questions (AI-generated)
- **Chatbot**: AI assistant trained on the business's information

## Subscription Plans

### Free Plan
- 1 business page
- Card scanning and contacts
- Social feed access
- Direct messaging

### Pro Plan ($20/month)
- Up to 10 business pages
- AI chatbot on pages
- Custom domain support
- Analytics dashboard
- Lead export
- Priority support

## Technical Details

- Built with Next.js (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Authentication via Supabase (Google, Apple, email, magic links)
- Database: MySQL with Prisma ORM
- AI: Claude/GPT for content generation
- OCR: Google Cloud Vision API
- Payments: Stripe
- Hosting: Vercel
- CDN: CloudFront

## Structured Data

All published business pages include Schema.org LocalBusiness structured data with:
- Business name, description, URL
- Industry/category
- Contact information (phone, email)
- Social media profiles
- Services offered
- Images

## Languages

- English (en) — LTR
- Hebrew (he) — RTL with full CSS logical properties support

## URLs

- Main platform: https://snap.cards
- Business pages: https://{slug}.snap.cards
- Custom domains: https://{yourdomain.com}
- Sitemap: https://snap.cards/sitemap.xml
